{{Quote|The first time I heard of Vimran Trell, I thought to myself: What could a cook possibly do for us? When the Adjudicator was sent to destroy a Rebel base, Trell proved his worth by warming Alliance agents. The Adjudicator found only a few deserted buildings. My opinion changed. And for those of you who haven't tried his Fromirian roast queg, you won't understand Moff Renquet's decision.|[[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]]|<ref name="CRO" />}}
'''Vimran Trell''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Yutusk]] who was a [[Chef/Legends|chef]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He served on board the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Adjudicator'']] around [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] where he fed vital intelligence to the Rebellion.

==Biography==
Vimran was born to [[Francill Trell|Francill]] and [[Tranira Trell]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Yutusk]]. He was taught to cook by his father who intended for Vimran to take over the family restaurant someday. Around [[6 BBY/Legends|6 BBY]] the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] invaded his homeworld Vimran was conscripted into the Imperial forces. He was transferred to the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Adjudicator'']]. On visiting the [[Liberator (Imperial I-class)|''Adjudicator'']] as a replacement [[Chef/Legends|chef]] while his parents were executed during an Imperial crackdown on an unarmed peaceful demonstration. An [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] panel determined Vimran to still be loyal to the Empire which forced him to return to duty and thus miss his parent's funeral.<ref name="CRO" />

Around [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]] the ''Adjudicator''{{'s}} commander, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Krin]] held a reception for [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Renquet]] and several other dignitaries when his galley chef became sick. Vimran informed the Captain that he was a gourmet chef and he was allowed to serve the reception. Moff Renquet was extremely pleased with both the food and the crew, especially Vimran's [[Fromirian roast queg]]. As a result the ''Adjudicator'' was transferred as command [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Sector/Legends|sector]].<ref name="CRO" />

Over the next four years Vimran and Captain Krin became friends and Vimran was assigned to be Krin's personal cook and assistant. He attended most staff meetings aboard the ''Adjudicator'' to provide food and refreshments as well as handling minor secretarial duties. Secretly he used these opportunities to feed intelligence to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] as revenge for what the Empire did to his family.<ref name="CRO" />

==Personality and traits==
Vimran was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. He was outwardly loyal enough to the Empire to fool an ISB security panel but secretly harbored ill will towards the Empire. He never forgot or forgave the Empire for its lack of compassion.<ref name="CRO" />

==Skills and abilities==
Vimran was talented at cooking and was skilled at preparing alien cuisine. He also had a good eye for identifying unusual foods and spices. He was also skilled at stealth and persuasion which helped him conduct his espionage activities.<ref name="CRO" />

==Equipment==
Vimran carried a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], various cook books, and sixty [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vimran Trell was designed by [[David R. Tulo, Jr.|David R. Tulo]], Jr., with input from [[Ron Hodge]], for ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1994]]. He was illustrated by [[Brian Schomburg]].<ref name="CRO" />
